indicators.name: seating arrangement
indicators.rationale: Rows of chairs facing a screen are designed for collective viewing, not individual work.

indicators.name: lack of flat work surface
indicators.rationale: No flat surface at sitting height for placing a laptop or other work tools.

indicators.name: screen orientation
indicators.rationale: The screen is oriented towards the back of the room, making it difficult to view from the seated positions.

indicators.name: lack of privacy
indicators.rationale: No walls or dividers to create a private workspace.

reasoning_summary: This indoor scene is marginally adequate for computer work (solo). The rows of chairs facing a screen are designed for collective viewing rather than individual work, and there is no flat surface at sitting height for placing a laptop or other work tools. The screen orientation and lack of privacy further reduce the suitability for focused solo work.
